repos.name: anthropics/claude-plugins-official
repos.desc: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

repos.name: colbymchenry/codegraph
repos.desc: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, OpenCode, and Hermes Agent — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.desc: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.desc: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

repos.name: dotnet/skills
repos.desc: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

repos.name: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
repos.desc: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.

repos.name: odoo/odoo
repos.desc: Odoo. Open Source Apps To Grow Your Business.

repos.name: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
repos.desc: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

repos.name: Fincept-Corporation/FinceptTerminal
repos.desc: FinceptTerminal is a modern finance application offering advanced market analytics, investment research, and economic data tools, designed for interactive exploration and data-driven decision-making in a user-friendly environment.

repos.name: can1357/oh-my-pi
repos.desc: ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

blog_md:
# 🚀 今日 GitHub 热搜：claude-plugins-official 霸榜，开发者集体失眠

> 📅 2026-05-23  |  🔍 共收录 14 个热门项目

每天打开 GitHub Trending 的瞬间，就像拆盲盒——你不知道会看到一个改变世界的项目，还是又一个「用 Rust 重写一切」的尝试。今日拆盒结果如下：

---

## 📊 今日统计

主力语言：**Python**: 5 | **TypeScript**: 4 | **Unknown**: 2 | **Rust**: 1 | **C#**: 1

> Python 选手：pip install 一下，问题解决了一半。另一半是版本冲突。

---
